title: Rei smiling across 56 different dubs
wikitext: []: Rei smiling, across 56 different dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Tue Aug 17, 2021 2:51 pm So a while back, I realized that what with all the different dubs of this series, and different versions of certain scenes, there are some scenes that have upwards of five dubs in certain languages. I started wondering which scenes would have the most dubs, and, well... this is the result: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RcDXHr ... sp=sharing (It's taking a while to process fully in Google Drive; if you want the best video quality I'd recommend downloading it.) Sorry about the length—there wasn't really any way around it. Watch the whole thing, skim it, whatever's to your taste; either way, it'd be interesting to hear people's thoughts on the different performances and translations
